notes: Catalog: legacy five-block NP depth for FNP batch slugs + PAD integrated reviews; scoped-gold: gold-premium-synthesis intro/labs/links + trimmed np-primary-care-foundations / np-heart-failure gold variants. Canada NP (ca-np-cnple) has no bundled lessons in catalog yet—batch is US FNP production content.
